scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @midterm/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @midterm/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @midterm/api" "npm run dev --workspace @midterm/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @midterm/shared && npm run build --workspace @midterm/api && npm run build --workspace @midterm/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @midterm/shared && npm run test --workspace @midterm/shared && npm run test --workspace @midterm/api && npm run test --workspace @midterm/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @midterm/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @midterm/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @midterm/web
